sections.paragraph:
(“to whom Jehovah is God,” i.e. worshipper of Jehovah), pr.n. Joel-

(1) a prophet, son of Pethuel, Joe 1:1.-(2) the eldest son of Samuel, 1Sa 8:2.-(3) a son of king Uzziah, 1Ch 6:21 for which (by a manifest [transcriptural] error), there is, verse 1Ch 6:9, שָׁאוּל; also the name of others.
